name: 鉄鍋のジャン！
title: 鉄鍋のジャン
overview_en: The story follows Jan a devilish master chef of Chinese cuisine who will stop at nothing to crush his opponents This is an adrenaline pumping tale where the unhinged cast defies ethics and treats cooking like magic creating all kinds of wild dishes Jan charges forward to face the ultimate Chinese cuisine battle ready to challenge the world

name: هيمنة عثة كتب
original_name: 本好きの下剋上 司書になるためには手段を選んでいられません
overview: تتوفّى عثّة كتُب نهِمة وطالبة الكلّية موتوسو أورانو على إثر حادِث قد وقع معها مباشرة بعد وصول خبر تعيينها كأمينة مكتبة وهو ما كانت تحلم به طوال حياتها ما إن استعادت وعيها حتّى وجدتْ نفسها باسم ماين وابنة لجنديّ فقير وتعيش في بلدة تتّبع نظاماً طبقياً قاسياً لكن ما دامت ماين تمتلك كتباً فإنّها لا تحتاج لأي شيء آخر غير أنّ الكتُب في هذا العالم كانت نادرة ولا يشتريها إلّا النبلاء لم يمنعها ذلك من اتّخاذها قراراً ألا وهو إن لم يكن هناك أي كتاب فسأصنع كتباً بنفسي
title: هيمنة عثة كتب
overview_en: When a sickly young girl suddenly becomes obsessed with inventing new things her family and friends are all puzzled What has gotten into Myne they wondered never dreaming that the answer is not a What but a Who Urano Motosu a book loving apprentice librarian who died in an earthquake in Tokyo who somehow found herself in Myne s body And since Myne s world is still in a medieval stage where books can only be owned by the elite the new Myne intends to do everything she can to bring her beloved books to the masses in the time she has left

name: ブチ切れ令嬢は報復を誓いました。～魔導書の力で祖国を叩き潰します～
original_name: ブチ切れ令嬢は報復を誓いました。～魔導書の力で祖国を叩き潰します～
title: ブチ切れ令嬢は報復を誓いました 魔導書の力で祖国を叩き潰します
title_en: A Livid Lady s Guide to Getting Even How I Crushed My Homeland with My Mighty Grimoires
overview_en: After being publicly betrayed by the crown prince and thrown into prison noblewoman Elizabeth escapes her kingdom with the legendary Seven Grimoires With help from a viscount from a neighboring nation she rebuilds her life while plotting revenge against the kingdom that cast her aside

title: Xeno
overview_en: A teenage girl develops an otherworldly bond with an alien after it crash lands in the desert As government agents close in she must protect her new friend while uncovering a secret that could change the fate of both their worlds

title: Mutiny
overview: تبدأ القصة عندما يتم توريط كول عميل سابق في القوات الخاصة وضابط شرطة سابق في مدينة نيويورك في جريمة قتل رجل أعمال ملياردير ويُتهم كول بقتل صديقه ورئيسه تيبو الذي وظف كول كخبير أمني خاص له فيضطر للهرب لإثبات براءته والكشف عن مؤامرة دولية
overview_en: After witnessing his billionaire boss murder and being framed for the crime Cole Reed boards a cargo ship on a one man crusade to avenge his boss death only to discover an international conspiracy

title: I Love Boosters
overview_en: A group of shoplifters take aim at a cutthroat fashion maven by stealing from her stores and reselling them at a lower price what they call fashion forward philanthropy

name: Ted Lasso
overview: يحكي العمل قصة لاعب الكرة المتقاعد تيد لاسو والذي يقرر السفر إلى المملكة المتحدة من أجل تدريب فريق فيكرة قدم في الدوري الممتاز يكافح من أجل البقاء
title: Ted Lasso
overview_en: Ted Lasso an American football coach moves to England when he s hired to manage a soccer team despite having no experience With cynical players and a doubtful town will he get them to see the Ted Lasso Way

name: 千香
title: 千香
overview_en: When the Sea Calamity strikes and the Divine Tree appears whoever claims its fruit gains power over all creation sparking a bloody war among the immortals demons and monsters A century later Lei Xiuyuan seeks out Qingqiu orphan Xiaobangchui to save his brother Fate brings them to Chufeng Academy where loyal friends give her warmth and love begins to bloom As their bond deepens from friendship to something more the truth of her origins slowly unravels threatening everything they ve built

title: A una isla de ti
overview_en: A romantic comedy set in the breathtaking Canary Islands After being left at the altar uptight chef Harry is convinced by his best friend to escape to her homeland Gran Canaria There amid stunning beaches vibrant culture and delicious cuisine Harry rediscovers joy and unexpectedly falls in love with his best friend s father Woven with humor heart and sun soaked adventures the film is a celebration of second chances and the power of unexpected love

name: さよならララ
title: さよならララ
overview_en: Once upon a time a mermaid princess named Lara fell in love with a human prince To be with him she used a witch s potion to become human but the magic came at a cost If she failed to find true love she would vanish into sea foam forever Now 200 years later Lara awakens in Lake Biwa with one final chance at life and love

title: Summer Sparks
overview_en: Follows a single father and a single mom at Camp Evergreen during a summer cook off where cooking mishaps and heartfelt moments lead to an unexpected romantic connection

title: شراً للخير
overview: القصة غير المروية لساحرات أوز يروي شرير قصة إلفابا ساحرة الغرب الشريرة المستقبلية وعلاقتها مع غليندا ساحرة الشمال الطيبة الجزء الثاني من فيلم روائي طويل من جزأين مقتبس من مسرحية برودواي الموسيقية
overview_en: As an angry mob rises against the Wicked Witch Glinda and Elphaba will need to come together one final time With their singular friendship now the fulcrum of their futures they will need to truly see each other with honesty and empathy if they are to change themselves and all of Oz for good

name: دليل جرائم القتل من فتاة صالحة
original_name: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
overview: بعد مرور خمس سنوات على وفاة طالبة المدرسة آندي بيل تبدأ بيبا فيتز أموبي رحلة للكشف عما حدث لها بالفعل لقد اعترف سال سينغ صديق آندي بالجريمة قبل أن ينهي حياته لكن بيب لا تصدق أنه المسؤول وتتعاون مع رافي شقيق سال لكشف الحقيقة إذا لم يكن سال سينغ قاتلاً وكان القاتل الحقيقي لا يزال طليقاً فإلى أي مدى قد يذهب لمنع بيب من معرفة الحقيقة
title: دليل جرائم القتل من فتاة صالحة
title_en: دليل جرائم القتل من فتاة صالحة
overview_en: Five years after the death of schoolgirl Andie Bell Pippa Fitz Amobi sets out to uncover what really happened to her Sal Singh Andie s boyfriend admitted to the murder before taking his own life but Pip doesn t believe he s responsible and teams up with Sal s brother Ravi to uncover the truth If Sal Singh isn t a murderer and the real killer is still out there how far will they go to keep Pip from finding out the truth

name: 無自覚聖女は今日も無意識に力を垂れ流す
original_name: 無自覚聖女は今日も無意識に力を垂れ流す
title: 無自覚聖女は今日も無意識に力を垂れ流す
title_en: The Oblivious Saint Can t Contain Her Power
overview_en: Overshadowed by her saintly sister Flora plain Carolina seizes a chance to be useful by agreeing to political marriage with a prince rumored to be cruel But the prince is nothing as expected he s a gentleman and Carolina feels valued for once in her life As Carolina blossoms she discovers a sense of self worth and a mysterious power while Flora s perfect life back home starts to crumble

title: ترون آريس
overview: برنامجٌ متطوّرٌ للغاية يُدعى آريس يُرسَل من العالم الرقمي إلى العالم الحقيقي في مهمةٍ خطيرة ليمثل أولَ اتصالٍ للبشرية مع كائناتٍ ذكيةٍ اصطناعية
overview_en: A highly sophisticated Program called Ares is sent from the digital world into the real world on a dangerous mission marking humankind s first encounter with A I beings

name: مزرعة كلاركسون
overview: اتبع محاولات جيريمي كلاركسون في إدارة مزرعة في الريف
title: مزرعة كلاركسون
overview_en: Follow Jeremy Clarkson as he embarks on his latest adventure farming The man who on several occasions claims to be allergic to manual labour takes on the most manually labour intensive job there is What could possibly go wrong

title: Cold Storage
overview_en: When a mutating highly contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility two employees joined by a grizzled bioterror operative must survive the wildest night shift ever to save humanity from extinction

name: 花ざかりの君たちへ
title: 花ざかりの君たちへ
overview_en: Mizuki Ashiya is on a mission disguise herself as a boy and enroll in a male boarding school to meet her idol high jump star Izumi Sano But after successfully infiltrating the school she discovers he s suddenly quit the sport Now Mizuki must dodge suspicion protect her cover and somehow reach the boy she came all this way for all while surviving the chaos of an all boys dorm

title: أناكوندا
overview: تدور احداث الفيلم وسط معاناة أزمة منتصف العمر تقرر مجموعة من الأصدقاء التعاون معًا في سبيل إنتاج نسخة حديثة من فيلمهم المفضل بفترة الشباب ولكن تقودهم الرحلة إلى مجموعة من الأحداث الغير متوقعة بالأدغال
overview_en: A group of friends facing mid life crises head to the rainforest with the intention of remaking their favorite movie from their youth only to find themselves in a fight for their lives against natural disasters giant snakes and violent criminals

name: 蓝嘴唇
title: 蓝嘴唇
overview_en: Curiosity gives way to a passionate and complex romance between a reserved shop owner and a rebellious musician

name: الشيء: مرحبًا بكم في ديري
overview: في عام 1962 ومع تزايد حالات اختفاء الأطفال الغامضة في بلدة ديري تبدأ مجموعة من الأصدقاء المنبوذين في الشك بوجود شرٍّ قديم ظلّ مدفونًا لسنوات طويلة وأثناء محاولتهم كشف الحقيقة ينتشر الخوف بين سكان البلدة فيتعاون بعضهم لاستعادة الأمان وفي الوقت نفسه تنفّذ جهة عسكرية أمريكية عملية سرية تسعى لاستغلال ما يحدث في ديري لتحقيق أهدافها الخاصة
title: الشيء مرحبًا بكم في ديري
overview_en: In 1962 amid a spate of unexplained disappearances of local children a group of misfit friends begin to suspect a long buried ancient evil lurking As the kids set out to determine what s really going on a rising unease prompts several townspeople to work together to restore peace all while a U S military operation seeks to exploit Derry for its own objectives

title: Finding Emily
overview_en: When a lovesick musician is given the wrong number for his dream girl he teams up with a driven psychology student to find her Together they spark a hilarious campus wide frenzy that tests their own hearts and ambitions along the way

name: Lanterns
title: Lanterns
overview_en: Two intergalactic cops new recruit John Stewart and Lantern legend Hal Jordan are drawn into a dark earth based mystery as they investigate a murder in the American heartland

name: 沧元图
overview: شهد مينغ تشوان مقتل والدته أمام عينيه فتدرب بجدٍّ على أمل أن ينتقم لموتها يومًا ما لكن أيامه الهادئة لم تدم طويلًا إذ أُلغيت خطوبته وهو أمرٌ غير متوقع
title: 沧元图
overview_en: Meng Chuan witnessed his mother killed before his eyes so he trained very hard hoping to one day avenge her death But his peaceful days were broken as his wedding engagement being called off an invasion by foreign forces the sanctuary fallen into enemy hands In order to protect the people of Ning City he picked up his sword and vowed to be the strongest This is a heavy responsibility and a long journey

name: 身代わり令嬢を救ったのは冷酷無慈悲な氷の王子の愛でした
original_name: 身代わり令嬢を救ったのは冷酷無慈悲な氷の王子の愛でした
title: 身代わり令嬢を救ったのは冷酷無慈悲な氷の王子の愛でした
title_en: Saved by the Ice Cold Prince s Embrace
overview_en: As the illegitimate daughter of a count and his maid Katrina was born into miserable circumstances And now that she s lost her mother the treatment from her stepsister and stepmother the countess has only grown worse One day her stepsister receives a royal order to move to the northern outskirts due to her unseemly behavior at a recent party There she is to learn proper conduct under the tutelage of the resident prince rumored to be a cruel man Not wanting to subject her daughter to such punishment the countess decides to send Katrina instead Katrina arrives in the north shaking in fear But contrary to the stories the merciless and cold hearted prince is kinder than she believed Might the pure hearted Katrina find love in the wintry countryside

title: معركة تلو الأخرى
overview: يعيش الثائر السابق بوب في حالة من الهواجس والبارانويا تحت تأثير المخدرات معتمدًا على حياة معزولة بعيدًا عن الشبكة برفقة ابنته ويلا المفعمة بالحيوية والاعتماد على الذات لكن حين يظهر عدوه اللدود من جديد بعد ستة عشر عامًا وتختفي ابنته يضطر ذلك الثائر المعتزل إلى الانطلاق في رحلة بحث عنها ليواجه كلاهما عواقب ماضيه
overview_en: Washed up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia surviving off grid with his spirited self reliant daughter Willa When his evil nemesis resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing the former radical scrambles to find her father and daughter both battling the consequences of his past

title: عملية إنقاذ الزوجة
overview: يتعاون محقق مع زوج طليقته الجديد لمطاردة خاطفيها فهل يتمكن هذا الثنائي غير المتوقع من وضع خلافاتهما جانبًا لتنفيذ عملية إنقاذ جريئة
overview_en: A detective teams up with his ex wife s new husband to chase down her kidnappers Can this unlikely duo put aside their differences for one wild rescue

name: เด็กชายไม่ไปสวรรค์
original_name: เด็กชายไม่ไปสวรรค์
title: เด็กชายไม่ไปสวรรค์
overview_en: A grieving student pursuing priesthood faces a crisis of faith when he falls for a troubled new classmate in a world ruled by strict dogma

title: Hungry
overview_en: A group of holidaymakers must fight for their lives against a rampaging hippo on the loose after becoming lost in the Louisiana swamplands

name: グロウアップショウ ～ひまわりのサーカス団～
original_name: グロウアップショウ ～ひまわりのサーカス団～
title: グロウアップショウ ひまわりのサーカス団
overview_en: Step right up to 1950s Japan The postwar economy is booming but the Sunflower Circus is not Led by ringmaster Maria the cash strapped troupe tours the country in desperate competition for a spot in the Circus Collection an elite global festival When circus prodigy Mizuka Tsurumaki joins their ranks the Sunflower Circus s fortune shifts finally giving them a shot at big top glory

title: Digger
overview_en: The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity s savior before the disaster he s unleashed destroys everything

title: Fall 2 Deadpoint
overview_en: On a perilous climb across Thailand s Mount Kwan two climbers become trapped thousands of feet above the ground where vertigo inducing heights sheer exposure and impossible odds turn every moment into a fight for survival

name: Your Friends & Neighbors
overview: يجد عملاق مالي نفسه فجأة مطلّقاً وعاطلاً عن العمل فيبدأ بسرقة جيرانه الأثرياء ليدبّر أموره ويتبين أن السرقة من أفراد دائرته الاجتماعية تثيره بشكل غريب إلّا أنه يتورط تدريجياً في شبكة فتاكة
title: Your Friends Neighbors
overview_en: When a financial titan suddenly finds himself divorced and jobless he starts robbing his wealthy neighbors to stay afloat Stealing from his own social circle strangely exhilarates him but he gradually gets tangled in a deadly web

title: Descendants Wicked Wonderland
overview_en: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe things seem perfect for Red and Chloe But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain Maddox Hatter When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts Red and Chloe must work with Red s new sister Pink Luisa Madrigal s son Luis and Maddox s son Max to save her and Wonderland

title: Strung
overview_en: A talented violinist s prestigious new role as a music tutor for an enigmatic elite family spirals into a psychological battle for her safety and sanity

title: Foufo
overview_en: A flying saucer aka UFO belonging to aliens that landed in Madura

title: The Furious Pertaruhan Maruah
overview_en: When YouTuber boxer Danial insults their late father s name brothers Firdaus and Hakim reunite one fighting for redemption the other for revenge in a battle that will decide not just who wins but what remains of The Furious legacy

name: パーフェクトアディクション
original_name: パーフェクトアディクション
title: パーフェクトアディクション
overview_en: Akihito a college student with a penchant for pretty faces and a penchant for womanizing finds Sae s beautiful face and aloof attitude utterly irritating At a group date he discovers that the girl he was targeting was only interested in Sae pushing his frustration to its peak Just then Akihito stumbles upon Sae arguing with a man in a hotel district Seeing Sae so vulnerable a stark contrast to his usual self Akihito is provoked and forcefully pushes him down However his unexpected reaction causes him to lose control

title: The Hoodoos
overview_en: When a crew of criminals attempts to steal cursed Confederate gold from a haunted Louisiana plantation they discover that the voodoo protecting the treasure is terrifyingly real and the dolls are awake

name: ファーストクライ 母子救命救急班
original_name: ファーストクライ 母子救命救急班
title: ファーストクライ 母子救命救急班
title_en: ファーストクライ 母子救命救急班
overview_en: A gifted obstetrician with hearing loss leads a newly formed emergency rescue team dedicated to saving pregnant women and unborn children who have nowhere else to turn

name: ちるらん 新撰組鎮魂歌 江戸青春篇
original_name: ちるらん 新撰組鎮魂歌 江戸青春篇
title: ちるらん 新撰組鎮魂歌 江戸青春篇
title_en: Song of the Samurai Chapter Youthful Days in Edo
overview_en: A live action adaptation that translates this deep legacy to the screen Set in Kyoto at the end of the Edo period the story depicts the intense and passionate lives of the Shinsengumi the iconic samurai force that defended Kyoto in the final years of Japan s shogunate through spectacular action and a bold interpretation based on historical facts The story follows street brawler Toshizo Hijikata Yuki Yamada who finds a new kind of family in Isami Kondo and Soji Okita Hijikata and his comrades in the Shinsengumi forge a bond of loyalty tested by betrayal illness and war as they fight not only their enemies but their own ideals

name: 猫と竜
title: 猫と竜
overview_en: An orphan since hatched a lone dragon named Uncle Wings is taken in by a family of magic wielding cats and raised as one of their own As Uncle Wings grows he becomes the cats protector determined to keep them safe from humans But as he watches the cats connect with humans using their magic Uncle Wings slowly starts to warm up to humans in this heartfelt bittersweet tale

name: Fatal Conflicts - The Rise and Fall of Civilisations
original_name: Fatal Conflicts - The Rise and Fall of Civilisations
title: Fatal Conflicts The Rise and Fall of Civilisations
title_en: Fatal Conflicts The Rise and Fall of Civilisations
overview_en: Documentary series on ZDF and ARTE

name: البداية بعد النهاية
original_name: 最強の王様、二度目の人生は何をする？
overview: بعد وفاة غامضة يُولد الملك غراي من جديد باسم آرثر ليوين في قارة ديكاثين السحرية وعلى الرغم من أنه يبدأ حياته الثانية كرضيع إلا أن حكمته السابقة تبقى معه يبدأ في إتقان السحر وشق طريقه الخاص مع مرور السنوات ساعيًا لتصحيح أخطاء حياته الماضية
title: البداية بعد النهاية
overview_en: After a mysterious death King Grey is reborn as Arthur Leywin on the magical continent of Dicathen Although he enters his second life as a baby his previous wisdom remains He begins to master magic and forge his own path as the years go by seeking to correct the mistakes of his past life

title: أسلحة
overview: عندما يختفي جميع الأطفال من نفس الفصل بشكل غامض في نفس الليلة وفي نفس الوقت تمامًا يتساءل المجتمع عن من أو ما الذي يقف وراء اختفائهم
overview_en: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance

title: In the Hand of Dante
overview_en: A Vatican priest discovers Dante s original Divine Comedy manuscript When asked to authenticate it writer Nick Tosches steals it while a parallel story follows Dante s quest to create his masterpiece

name: The Miniature Wife
title: The Miniature Wife
overview_en: Lindy and Les a married writer and scientist are forced to re evaluate the power balances in their relationship after a freak accident shrinks Lindy down to 6 inches tall

title: பிளாஸ்ட்
overview_en: A seemingly ordinary family must unleash their hidden martial arts skills when they clash with a ruthless criminal gang tied to corruption and violence

name: Alone
title: Alone
overview_en: Hardcore survivalists are put by themselves in the Vancouver Island wilderness without camera crews teams or producers on a single mission to stay alive for as long as possible

name: The Iris Affair
title: The Iris Affair
overview_en: A rootless genius Iris Nixon steals an enigmatic code from a charming philanthropist and disappears A tense countdown ensues as she races to unravel the code s mystery

name: Celebrity Family Feud
title: Celebrity Family Feud
overview_en: Celebrity Family Feud pits celebrities and their families against each other in a contest to name the most popular responses to survey type questions posed to 100 people

title: No Good Men
overview_en: 2021 Afghanistan right before the Taliban s return Naru the only camerawoman at Kabul s main TV station struggles to keep custody of her three year old son after leaving her serial cheater husband Convinced no good men exist in her country Naru is caught off guard when Qodrat Kabul TV s most important journalist gives her a career opportunity As the two crisscross the city reporting on its last days of freedom sparks fly and Naru starts to doubt herself could there actually be a good man out there

name: 鎧真伝サムライトルーパー
original_name: 鎧真伝サムライトルーパー
title: 鎧真伝サムライトルーパー
overview_en: The Demon World once plunged the Human World into terror With the seal broken and hordes of Demon Soldiers launching an invasion five young warriors rushed to humanity s rescue They were called the Samurai Troopers and now their battle begins anew

title: Coyote vs ACME
overview_en: After Acme products fail him one too many times in his dogged pursuit of the Roadrunner Wile E Coyote decides to hire a billboard lawyer to sue the Acme Corporation

title: Qadira
overview_en: Sukant returns from a work trip and finds out that his partner Tara has ended their relationship and left The heartbreak combined with his failing startup builds up to a point where he tries to end his life But then he receives an unexpected phone call

name: صانع السلام
overview: يتناول العمل القصة الأصلية لشخصية بيسميكر صانع السلام والذي يُكرس حياته من أجل نشر السلام العالمي وفعل كل ما في وسعه لتحقيق سعيه حتى لو كان ذلك باستخدام السلاح
title: صانع السلام
overview_en: The continuing story of Peacemaker a vainglorious superhero supervillain who believes in peace at any cost no matter how many people he has to kill After a miraculous recovery from his duel with Bloodsport Peacemaker soon discovers that his freedom comes at a price

name: เพย์แบค เดอะซีรีส์
original_name: เพย์แบค เดอะซีรีส์
title: เพย์แบค เดอะซีรีส์
overview_en: A grieving debt collector enters the entertainment world for revenge only to fall into a dangerous attraction with a powerful executive

title: المسيرة الطويلة
overview: في مستقبل قريب تحولت فيه أمريكا إلى دولة بوليسية يختار مئة فتى للمشاركة في مسابقة سنوية يمنح الفائز فيها ما يشاء لبقية حياته قواعد اللعبة بسيطة يجب الحفاظ على سرعة مشي ثابتة لا تقل عن ثلاثة أميال في الساعة دون توقف ثلاثة تحذيرات تعني الخروج نهائيا
overview_en: In a dystopian 1970s America fifty teenage boys take part in a deadly annual walking contest forced to maintain a minimum pace or be executed until only one survivor remains

name: Lucky
overview: عندما تفشل عملية سرقة بملايين الدولارات تُجبر المحتالة لاكي على الفرار وبين الهرب من الفيدراليين وزعيم جريمة لا يرحم تقاتل لاكي للنجاة بحياتها ولإيجاد مخرج
title: Lucky
overview_en: When a multi million dollar heist goes sideways con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss Lucky must fight for her life and a way out

name: سيد الخواتم: خواتم السلطة
original_name: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
overview: بدءا من وقت السلم النسبي نتابع مجموعة من الشخصيات وهم يواجهون عودة ظهور الشر إلى الأرض الوسطى من أحلك أعماق الجبال الضبابية إلى غابات ليندون المهيبة إلى مملكة جزيرة نومينور الخلابة إلى أبعد مدى من الخريطة ستقوم هذه الممالك والشخصيات بنحت الموروثات التي تعيش لفترة طويلة بعد رحيلها

seasons.name: الموسم الثاني
seasons.overview: عاد "ساورون". وبعد أن طردته "غولادريل"، يتعين على سيد الظلام الآن الاعتماد على دهائه لاستعادة قوته وصياغة السُلطة القدر الأسطورية، مهدداً بربط جميع شعوب "الأرض الوسطى" بإرادته الشريرة. يضع الموسم الـ2 أكثر الشخصيات المحبوبة فيه في موجة متصاعدة من الظلام، ويتحدى كل منهم لإيجاد مكانه في عالم على حافة الكارثة.

title: سيد الخواتم خواتم السلطة
overview_en: Beginning in a time of relative peace we follow an ensemble cast of characters as they confront the re emergence of evil to Middle earth From the darkest depths of the Misty Mountains to the majestic forests of Lindon to the breathtaking island kingdom of Númenor to the furthest reaches of the map these kingdoms and characters will carve out legacies that live on long after they are gone

name: Migawari Reijou wo Sukutta no wa Reikoku Mujihi na Koori no Ouji no Ai deshita
original_name: Migawari Reijou wo Sukutta no wa Reikoku Mujihi na Koori no Ouji no Ai deshita
title: Migawari Reijou wo Sukutta no wa Reikoku Mujihi na Koori no Ouji no Ai deshita
title_en: Migawari Reijou wo Sukutta no wa Reikoku Mujihi na Koori no Ouji no Ai deshita

title: Ballistic
overview_en: When a soldier s mother discovers the bullet that killed her son in Afghanistan was made at the factory where she works she sets out on a path of revenge against those responsible

title: بوجونيا
overview: شابان مهووسان بنظريات المؤامرة يختطفان الرئيسة التنفيذية القوية لشركة كبرى مقتنعين بأنها كائن فضائي عازم على تدمير كوكب الأرض
overview_en: Two conspiracy obsessed young men kidnap the high powered CEO of a major company convinced that she is an alien intent on destroying planet Earth

name: 그대에게 드림
title: 그대에게 드림
overview_en: Dreaming of filmmaking a passionate high schooler pushes aside all obligations to create short films inspiring a studious but passionless classmate Their deep bond eventually turns romantic but they are abruptly separated when he is forced to move overseas Years later in their thirties their lives have completely swapped she is a disillusioned struggling TV reporter while he has become an award winning director When a sudden reunion brings them face to face he resolves to help her rediscover her lost spark but she still harbors deep resentment over his past disappearance

name: All Her Fault
title: All Her Fault
overview_en: In Chicago Marissa Irvine arrives at 14 Arthur Avenue expecting to pick up her young son Milo from his first playdate with a boy at his new school But the woman who answers the door isn t a mother she recognizes She isn t the nanny She doesn t have Milo And so begins every parent s worst nightmare

name: The Chi
title: The Chi
overview_en: A relevant timely and distinctive coming of age story following a half dozen interrelated characters in the South Side of Chicago The story centers on Brandon an ambitious and confident young man who dreams about opening a restaurant of his own someday but is conflicted between the promise of a new life and his responsibility to his mother and teenage brother back in the South Side

name: ورود وذنوب
overview: رجل فقد والده وثروته وهو طفل لكنه بنى إمبراطورية على أساس العائلة والنزاهة تتبدل حياته عندما تخفي زوجته سرًا مدمرًا وتدخل في غيبوبة أثناء بحثه عن الإجابات يقسو قلبه حتى يلتقي بصانعة الزهور الشغوفة التي تسعى وراء نفس الحقيقة مما يشعل رحلة من الثقة والشغف والخلاص

seasons.name: الموسم 1
seasons.overview: رجل فقد والده وثروته وهو طفل، لكنه بنى إمبراطورية على أساس العائلة والنزاهة. تتبدل حياته عندما تخفي زوجته سرًا مدمرًا وتدخل في غيبوبة. أثناء بحثه عن الإجابات، يقسو قلبه، حتى يلتقي بصانعة الزهور الشغوفة التي تسعى وراء نفس الحقيقة، مما يشعل رحلة من الثقة والشغف والخلاص.

title: ورود وذنوب
overview_en: As a boy Serhat lost both his father and fortune but built an empire on family and integrity His world shatters when his wife Berrak hides a devastating secret and falls into a coma While searching for answers his heart hardens until he meets Zeynep a passionate florist chasing the same truth igniting a journey of trust passion and redemption

title: العرافة واللعنة
overview: في إطار من الرعب والغموض تدور الأحداث حول لعنة تهدد حياة مجموعة من النساء المقيمات في فندق تملكه صفية التي تحاول كسر تلك اللعنة ومواجهة الشر الذي يهددهن عبر طقوس غامضة كشفتها لهن إحدى العرافات
overview_en: A businesswoman owns a hotel for women and has ten lifelong friends A fortune teller tells her that one of her friends will die every year

name: The Dry
title: The Dry
overview_en: Shiv Sheridan returns to Dublin after years of partying in London and tries to navigate a new phase of her life Trying to stay sober and being back with her family is not going to be easy

title: سيقتلونك
overview: تستجيب امرأة لإعلان طلب مساعدة للعمل كتدبير منزلي في برج سكني غامض بمدينة نيويورك غير مدركة أنها تدخل مجتمعاً شهد العديد من حالات الاختفاء على مر السنين وقد يكون واقعاً تحت قبضة طائفة شيطانية
overview_en: A woman answers a help wanted ad to be a housekeeper in a mysterious New York City high rise unaware that she is entering a community that has seen a number of disappearances over the years and may be under the grip of a Satanic cult

title: مخلوقات مشرقة بشكل مبهر
overview: أثناء العمل ليلًا في معرض للأحياء المائية في بلدة صغيرة تنسج أرملة روابط عميقة مع أخطبوط ذكي وشاب تائه في هذه الدراما المحركة للمشاعر والمقتبسة من رواية شهيرة
overview_en: Through unlikely bonds formed during night shifts at a local aquarium Tova an elderly widow learns of a life changing discovery that may bring her joy and wonder once again

title: The Wrong Girls
overview_en: Two codependent best friends living paycheck to paycheck and bong rip to bong rip get caught in a case of mistaken identity that throws their lives into chaos

name: ワールド イズ ダンシング
original_name: ワールド イズ ダンシング
title: ワールド イズ ダンシング
overview_en: In 1374 amid the turmoil of the Northern and Southern Courts long running conflict a boy named Oniyasha is born into a family of sarugaku theater performers He spends his days in a kind of quiet gloom haunted by a simple but persistent question Why do people dance Then one day he witnesses a dance that he feels to be good and everything begins to change This is the story of the beautiful young boy who would one day shape the art of Noh and be remembered as Zeami

title: 功夫女足
overview_en: The Supreme Invincible Cup is about to begin and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented showdown But the Kung Fu Women s Soccer Team has been dealt a hellish script right from the start Their opponents are all highly skilled and external pressure is mounting The schemes on the field are one after another Can they use their kung fu to turn the tide on the green field

name: التضاءل
overview: جيمي يكافح للحداد على وفاة زوجته بينما يشغل دور الأب والصديق والطبيب النفسي فيقرّر تجربة نهج جديد مع كل من في طريقه الصراحة القاسية التامة فهل سيحسّن ذلك الأوضاع أم يتسبّب في خلق فوضى عارمة
title: التضاءل
overview_en: Jimmy is struggling to grieve the loss of his wife while being a dad friend and therapist He decides to try a new approach with everyone in his path unfiltered brutal honesty Will it make things better or unleash uproarious chaos

name: 脱口秀和Ta的朋友们
title: 脱口秀和Ta的朋友们
overview_en: A professional comedy talk show competition program the program invites outstanding stand up artists at home and abroad to share happiness convey a positive attitude to life and comedy spirit

name: المؤسس عثمان
overview: ملحمة تاريخية من أضخم إنتاجات الدراما التركية تعرض سيرة المؤسس عثمان بن أرطغرل ومعاركه ضد مغول الشرق وبيزنطيي الغرب وضعف الدولة وخيانات الأقربين وجهاده ومحاربوه لزرع الشجرة التي ظللت فروعها الدنيا
title: المؤسس عثمان
overview_en: The epic continuation of Diriliş Ertuğrul Kuruluş Osman follows Osman Bey son of Ertuğrul and destined founder of the Ottoman Empire as he transforms a small Turkic tribe into a sovereign state Battling the Byzantine Empire Mongol forces and treachery from within Osman must prove himself as both a warrior and a leader A sweeping historical action drama built on faith honour and the birth of one of history s greatest empires

title: Her Private Hell
overview_en: When a mysterious mist engulfs a futuristic metropolis unleashing a deadly and elusive entity a troubled young woman searches for her father Her quest collides with an American GI on a harrowing odyssey to rescue his daughter from Hell

name: Adventure Time: Side Quests
title: Adventure Time Side Quests
overview_en: Young hero Finn and his magical dog best friend Jake embark on adventures across the fantastical land of Ooo partying with cloud people and punching evil in the butt along the way

name: 魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
original_name: 魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
title: 魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
title_en: Magical Girl Lyrical NANOHA EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
overview_en: Thirty years ago aliens attacked Earth and nearly brought humanity to extinction Since then mankind has clawed for survival fighting the invaders for land and the UN established EXCEEDS an agency to stave off alien threats On a remote island in a world of chaos young hunter Shiina yearns for a quiet life with her sister Setsuna but a single incident draws her into the larger battle

title: The Hunger Games Sunrise on the Reaping
original_title: The Hunger Games Sunrise on the Reaping
title_en: The Hunger Games Sunrise on the Reaping
overview_en: Return to the world of Panem 24 years before the events of The Hunger Games starting on the morning of the reaping of the 50th Hunger Games also known as the Second Quarter Quell

name: The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin
original_name: The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin
title: The Pendragon Cycle Rise of the Merlin
title_en: The Pendragon Cycle Rise of the Merlin
overview_en: Merlin the immortal son of the bard Taliesin and Atlantean Princess Charis is followed through his tragic upbringing descent into madness and shocking disappearance leading to the legend that surrounds him Set before King Arthur s birth Merlin assumed dead or a myth reemerges in sub Roman Britain to unite the fractured kingdoms under threat from Saxon invaders

name: Margo's Got Money Troubles
overview: الكاتبة الصاعدة مارغو ميليت تحمل بجنين ما يجبرها على ترك الدراسة الجامعية ومواجهة أزمة مالية لكن حين يعاود والدها الغائب المصارع السابق الظهور في حياتها تجد مارغو وسيلة جديدة لاستغلال موهبتها مادياً في كتابة القصص
title: Margo s Got Money Troubles
overview_en: The daughter of a former Hooter s waitress and an ex pro wrestler Margo is a recent college dropout and aspiring writer Faced with a new baby mounting pile of bills and dwindling number of ways to pay them Margo must find a way forward

title: Pillion
overview_en: Colin a timid gay man is swept off his feet when Ray an enigmatic and impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive in a crazy and erotic BDSM focused relationship

name: Prisoner
title: Prisoner
overview_en: A young and ambitious prison officer finds herself in the middle of a battle for the criminal underworld as crime lords try to evade justice But in order to do that she will have to learn quickly to put her faith in one of the very men she wants to put behind bars

title: 入凶宅
overview_en: Song Hui secretly takes shelter in a haunted house encountering a series of supernatural phenomena As she uncovers the terrifying truth of the house she embarks on a thrilling journey intertwined with trauma and protection

title: Forgotten Island
overview_en: While celebrating their last night together high school graduates and best friends Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever

name: มังงะสั่งตาย
original_name: มังงะสั่งตาย
title: มังงะสั่งตาย
overview_en: A manga artist and a determined police officer investigate murders inspired by an underground comic uncovering a shared tragedy that links their pasts

name: The Legend of Vox Machina
overview: إنهم صاخبون إنهم خرقاء إنهم غير مناسبين تحولوا إلى مرتزقة للتأجير فوكس ماتشينا مهتم أكثر بالمال السهل والبيرة الرخيصة أكثر من حماية العالم بالفعل ولكن عندما تكون المملكة مهددة بالشر يدرك هذا الطاقم الصاخب أنهم الوحيدون القادرون على استعادة العدالة
title: The Legend of Vox Machina
overview_en: They re rowdy they re ragtag they re misfits turned mercenaries for hire Vox Machina is more interested in easy money and cheap ale than actually protecting the realm But when the kingdom is threatened by evil this boisterous crew realizes that they are the only ones capable of restoring justice

name: DTF St. Louis
title: DTF St Louis
overview_en: A love triangle among three adults experiencing middle age malaise leads to one of them ending up dead

name: شركة ماجيلومير الفتيات الساحرات المتحدة
overview: الفتيات الساحرات وظيفة الأحلام الفائقة والرائعة والقوية الطالبة الجامعية كانا ساكوراغي تبحث عن عمل لكن من دون جدوى ذات يوم تورطت في هجوم شنّته كاي تطير الفتاة السحرية القوية هيتومي كوشيغايا لإنقاذها وتستغل كانا ذاكرتها الممتازة لمساعدتها على التغلب عليها بعد توظيفها كفتاة سحرية من قبل شركة ماجيلومير الفتيات الساحرات المتحدة تخطو كانا أولى خطواتها في عالم العمل
title: شركة ماجيلومير الفتيات الساحرات المتحدة
overview_en: Magical girls strong cool the ultimate dream job College student Kana Sakuragi is job hunting without much luck One day she is caught up in an attack by a Kaii Fiesty magical girl Hitomi Koshigaya flies to the rescue and Kana uses her excellent memory to help her take it down Hired as a magical girl by Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc Kana takes her first step into the working world

title: حظاً موفقاً استمتع بوقتك لا تموت
original_title: Good Luck Have Fun Don t Die
overview: يصل رجل من المستقبل إلى مطعم في لوس أنجلوس حيث يتعين عليه تجنيد مجموعة محددة من الزبائن الساخطين للانضمام إليه في مهمة ليلة واحدة لإنقاذ العالم من خطر مميت يتمثل في كائن فضائي
title_en: حظاً موفقاً استمتع بوقتك لا تموت
overview_en: A Man from the Future arrives at an LA diner where he must recruit the precise combination of disgruntled patrons to join him on a one night quest to save the world from the terminal threat of a rogue artificial intelligence

title: لا خيار آخر
overview: بعد فصله وإذلاله من قبل سوق عمل قاسٍ لا يرحم ينحدر مدير مصنع ورق مخضرم نحو العنف في محاولة يائسة لاستعادة كرامته
overview_en: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market a veteran paper mill manager descends into violence in a desperate bid to reclaim his dignity

name: World War II with Tom Hanks
original_name: World War II with Tom Hanks
title: World War II with Tom Hanks
title_en: World War II with Tom Hanks
overview_en: Explores WWII from Germany s invasion of Poland through the atomic age examining pivotal battles wartime leaders like Churchill and Roosevelt and the human cost of total war

name: King of the Hill
title: King of the Hill
overview_en: Set in Texas this animated series follows the life of propane salesman Hank Hill who lives with his overly confident substitute Spanish teacher wife Peggy wannabe comedian son Bobby and naive niece Luanne Hank has conservative views about God family and country but his values and ethics are often challenged by the situations he his family and his beer drinking neighbors buddies find themselves in

title: شفرات الحراس رياح الصحراء
overview: تدور أحداث الفيلم في صحراء الغرب حيث تتصارع قوى متعددة من حماة القوافل والسلطات إلى العائلات النافذة وسط مؤامرات وصراعات خفية يقبل دوو ما أحد أخطر المطلوبين مهمة مرافقة غامضة إلى العاصمة تشانغآن لكنه يكتشف أن الشخص الذي يحميه هو المطلوب الأول في البلاد ومع انتشار الخبر تتسابق القوى المتنافسة للاستيلاء على القافلة لتندلع معارك دامية تكشف أسرارًا قد تغيّر مصير الجميع
overview_en: Dao Ma the second most wanted fugitive is entrusted by his benefactor the chief of Mo family clan to take on a mysterious escort mission escorting the most wanted fugitive to Chang an

name: Project Runway
title: Project Runway
overview_en: Aspiring fashion designers compete for a chance to break into the industry Each week a designer is eliminated from the competition after exhibiting their work in front of a judges panel

title: You re Dead to Me
overview_en: The Film focuses on a group of high school seniors grappling with the reality of moving away to college As if senior year couldn t be stressful enough there is also a serial killer on the loose
